description: During a flight, a pilot notices favorable conditions and wants to request a more direct routing from Air Traffic Control to save time and fuel.

nodes.task_description: Identify a potential shortcut or more direct route to the destination.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot finds a more efficient route.

nodes.task_description: Contact ATC and formally request the direct routing.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot makes the request to ATC.

nodes.task_description: ATC approves the request. The pilot updates the Flight Management System (FMS) with the new route.

expected_outcome.value: Pilot receives approval and reprograms the FMS.
